title: orthopogon loliaceus
intro: Orthopogon loliaceus, also known as Veldt Grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Orthopogon loliaceus include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and alleviate digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and can also be used in topical applications to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
